member.name: T:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureBlobStorageContainerResource
member.summary: A resource that represents an Azure Blob Storage container.

member.summary: A resource that represents an Azure Blob Storage container.

member.summary: Gets the blob container name.

member.summary: Gets the connection string template for the manifest for the Azure Blob Storage container resource.

member.name: T:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureBlobStorageResource

member.summary: A resource that represents an Azure Blob Storage account.
member.param: The that the resource is stored in.

member.summary: Gets the parent AzureStorageResource of this AzureBlobStorageResource.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureBlobStorageResource.UriExpression
member.summary: Gets the connection URI expression for the blob storage service.
member.remarks: Format: https://{host}:{port} for emulator or {blobEndpoint} for Azure.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureBlobStorageResource.ConnectionStringExpression
member.summary: Gets the connection string template for the manifest for the Azure Blob Storage resource.

member.summary: Wraps an in a type that exposes container extension methods.
member.param: The inner resource used to store annotations.

member.name: T:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureStorageResource
member.summary: Represents an Azure Storage resource.
member.param: Callback to configure the Azure resources.

member.summary: Represents an Azure Storage resource.
member.param: Callback to configure the Azure resources.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureStorageResource.BlobEndpoint
member.summary: Gets the "blobEndpoint" output reference from the bicep template for the Azure Storage resource.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureStorageResource.QueueEndpoint
member.summary: Gets the "queueEndpoint" output reference from the bicep template for the Azure Storage resource.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureStorageResource.TableEndpoint
member.summary: Gets the "tableEndpoint" output reference from the bicep template for the Azure Storage resource.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureStorageResource.DataLakeEndpoint
member.summary: Gets the "dataLakeEndpoint" output reference from the bicep template for the Azure Storage resource.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureStorageResource.Id
member.summary: Gets the "id" output reference for the resource.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureStorageResource.NameOutputReference
member.summary: Gets the "name" output reference for the resource.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureStorageResource.IsEmulator
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the Azure Storage resource is running in the local emulator.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureStorageResource.BlobUriExpression
member.summary: Gets the connection URI expression for the blob storage service.
member.remarks: Format: https://{host}:{port} for emulator or {blobEndpoint} for Azure.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureStorageResource.DataLakeUriExpression
member.summary: Gets the connection URI expression for the data lake storage service.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureStorageResource.QueueUriExpression
member.summary: Gets the connection URI expression for the queue storage service.
member.remarks: Format: https://{host}:{port} for emulator or {queueEndpoint} for Azure.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureStorageResource.TableUriExpression
member.summary: Gets the connection URI expression for the table storage service.
member.remarks: Format: https://{host}:{port} for emulator or {tableEndpoint} for Azure.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureStorageResource.GetEmulatorConnectionString
member.summary: Gets the connection string for the Azure Storage emulator.
member.returns: The connection string for the Azure Storage emulator.

member.summary: Represents an Azure Table Storage resource.

member.summary: Gets the connection URI expression for the table storage service.

member.name: T:Aspire.Hosting.AzureStorageExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for adding Azure Storage resources to an application model.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureStorageExtensions.AddAzureStorage(Aspire.Hosting.IDistributedApplicationBuilder,System.String)
member.summary: Adds an Azure Storage resource to the application model. This resource can be used to create Azure blob, table, and queue resources.
member.param: The builder for the distributed application.
member.remarks:
By default references to the Azure Storage resource will be assigned the following roles:
- - -
These can be replaced by calling .

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureStorageExtensions.RunAsEmulator(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureStorageResource},System.Action{Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureStorageEmulatorResource}})
member.summary: Configures an Azure Storage resource to be emulated using Azurite. This resource requires an to be added to the application model.
member.remarks: This version of the package defaults to the tag of the / container image.
member.param: Callback that exposes underlying container used for emulation to allow for customization.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureStorageExtensions.WithDataBindMount(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureStorageEmulatorResource},System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Adds a bind mount for the data folder to an Azure Storage emulator resource.
member.param: Relative path to the AppHost where emulator storage is persisted between runs. Defaults to the path '.azurite/{builder.Resource.Name}'
A flag that indicates if this is a read-only mount.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureStorageExtensions.WithDataVolume(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureStorageEmulatorResource},System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Adds a named volume for the data folder to an Azure Storage emulator resource.
member.param: The name of the volume. Defaults to an auto-generated name based on the application and resource names.
A flag that indicates if this is a read-only volume.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureStorageExtensions.WithBlobPort(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureStorageEmulatorResource},System.Int32)
member.summary: Modifies the host port that the storage emulator listens on for blob requests.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureStorageExtensions.WithQueuePort(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureStorageEmulatorResource},System.Int32)
member.summary: Modifies the host port that the storage emulator listens on for queue requests.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureStorageExtensions.WithTablePort(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureStorageEmulatorResource},System.Int32)
member.summary: Modifies the host port that the storage emulator listens on for table requests.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureStorageExtensions.WithApiVersionCheck(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureStorageEmulatorResource},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Ensures the emulator checks that the requested API version is valid.
member.param: Whether to enable API version check or not. Default is true.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureStorageExtensions.AddBlobs(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureStorageResource},System.String)
member.summary: Creates a builder for the which can be referenced to get the Azure Storage blob endpoint for the storage account.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureStorageExtensions.AddDataLake(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureStorageResource},System.String)
member.summary: Creates a builder for the which can be referenced to get the Azure Data Lake endpoint for the storage account.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureStorageExtensions.GetBlobService(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureStorageResource})
member.summary: Creates a builder for the which can be referenced to get the Azure Storage blob endpoint for the storage account.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureStorageExtensions.AddBlobContainer(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureStorageResource},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a builder for the which can be referenced to get the Azure Storage blob container endpoint for the storage account.
member.param: The name of the blob container.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureStorageExtensions.AddDataLakeFileSystem(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureStorageResource},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a builder for the which can be referenced to get the Azure DataLake file system connection string.
member.param: The name of the data lake file system.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureStorageExtensions.AddBlobContainer(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureBlobStorageResource},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a builder for the which can be referenced to get the Azure Storage blob container endpoint for the storage account.
member.param: The name of the blob container.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureStorageExtensions.AddTables(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureStorageResource},System.String)
member.summary: Creates a builder for the which can be referenced to get the Azure Storage tables endpoint for the storage account.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureStorageExtensions.AddQueues(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureStorageResource},System.String)
member.summary: Creates a builder for the which can be referenced to get the Azure Storage queues endpoint for the storage account.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureStorageExtensions.GetQueueService(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureStorageResource})
member.summary: Gets a builder for the which can be referenced to get the Azure Storage queues endpoint for the storage account.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureStorageExtensions.AddQueue(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureStorageResource},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a builder for the which can be referenced to get the Azure Storage queue for the storage account.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureStorageExtensions.WithRoleAssignments``1(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{``0},Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureStorageResource},Azure.Provisioning.Storage.StorageBuiltInRole[])
member.summary: Assigns the specified roles to the given resource, granting it the necessary permissions on the target Azure Storage account. This replaces the default role assignments for the resource.
member.param: The resource to which the specified roles will be assigned.
The built-in storage roles to be assigned.
member.returns: The updated with the applied role assignments.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureStorageExtensions.WithRoleAssignments``1(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{``0},Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureStorageResource},Aspire.Hosting.AzureStorageRole[])
member.summary: Assigns the specified roles to the given resource, granting it the necessary permissions on the target Azure Storage account. This replaces the default role assignments for the resource.
member.param: The resource to which the specified roles will be assigned.
The storage roles to be assigned.
member.returns: The updated with the applied role assignments.
member.exception: Thrown when a role value is not a valid value.

member.name: T:Aspire.Hosting.AzureStorageRole
member.summary: Represents ATS-compatible Azure Storage roles.

member.name: M:Aspire.AzureCredentialHelper.CreateDefaultAzureCredential
member.summary: Creates a for code that can run in local development or deployed to Azure.

member.name: M:Aspire.AzureCredentialHelper.CreateDevelopmentAzureCredential
member.summary: Creates a optimized for local development by excluding credential types not applicable on developer machines.
